Title: Add Dynamic Property for Store - From Module
Preconditions: Admin logged into backend ({{BACK_URL}})
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to More > Dynamic Properties at {{BACK_URL}}
[ACT] Select type 'VirtoCommerce.StoreModule.Core.Model.Store'
[ACT] Click Add Property
[ACT] Enter property name: StoreProperty1
[ACT] Select value type: Short text
[ACT] Click Save
[NAV] Navigate to Stores module
[ACT] Open any store
[NAV] Navigate to Dynamic Properties widget
[ASSERT] Verify property appears
Assertions:
[STATE] Property created in Dynamic Properties module
[DOM] Property automatically appears in Store's Dynamic Properties widget
[STATE] Property available for value assignment
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/platform/dynamic-properties - verify property in response
[ADMIN] Verify property visible in Store UI
[CONSOLE] No errors on creation
Failure_Signals: Property not in Dynamic Properties list; property absent from Store widget after creation
Cleanup: delete created dynamic property via Admin
